---
title: "Location"
---

## Find Us

**BLiNK (Bilingualism: Language in NeuroKognition) Lab**<br>
Department of Spanish and Portuguese<br>
Rutgers University<br>
1 Spring Street<br>
New Brunswick, NJ 08901

## Map

<div class="video-wrapper">
<iframe
  src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=1+Spring+Street,+New+Brunswick,+NJ+08901&output=embed"
  title="BLiNK Lab location"
  frameborder="0"
  allowfullscreen
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
</div>

[View on the Rutgers campus map](https://maps.rutgers.edu/map#/?lat=40.495261&lng=-74.444876&selected=8823&sidebar=true&underConstructionState=true&zoom=21){.signup-button}
